---
title: "nashpy via reticulate"
short-title: "nashpy + reticulate"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Python interop for mixed-strategy Nash equilibrium solvers."
keywords: ["nashpy", "reticulate", "Python", "Nash equilibrium", "mixed strategies"]
---

# nashpy via reticulate {#sec-nashpy-reticulate}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
